name: proc_creation_win_diskshadow_script_mode_susp_location
raw_query: any where (process.pe.original_file_name:"diskshadow.exe" or process.executable:"*\\diskshadow.exe") and process.command_line like~ ("*-s *", "*/s *", "*–s *", "*—s *", "*―s *") and (process.command_line like~ ("*:\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\*", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*", "*\\Users\\Public\\*"))
